testcase.failure:
java.lang.AssertionError: 1 expectation failed. Response body doesn't match expectation. Expected: a string containing "{\"result\":[{\"PastDue\":\"5847.60\",\"CurrentBalance\":\"0.00\",\"UnpostedBalance\":\"-90.99\",\"AmountDue\":\"5756.61\",\"AccountBalance\":\"5756.61\",\"OverShort\":\"0.00\",\"DepositAmount\":\"0.00\",\"DepositOutstandingAmount\":\"0.00\",\"InstallmentBudget\":\"0.00\",\"InstallmentSPA\":\"0.00\",\"LastPaymentDate\":\"2020-01-15\",\"LastPaymentAmount\":\"90.99\",\"LastDueDate\":\"2000-10-02\",\"LatestStatementDate\":\"2000-03-31\",\"LatestStatementAmount\":\"21.52\",\"IsMasterLocation\":false,\"IsIncludedLocation\":false}]}" Actual: {"result":[{"PastDue":"5847.60","CurrentBalance":"0.00","UnpostedBalance":"0.00","AmountDue":"5847.60","AccountBalance":"5847.60","OverShort":"0.00","DepositAmount":"0.00","DepositOutstandingAmount":"0.00","InstallmentBudget":"0.00","InstallmentSPA":"0.00","LastPaymentDate":"2000-11-17","LastPaymentAmount":"5000.00","LastDueDate":"2000-10-02","LatestStatementDate":"2000-03-31","LatestStatementAmount":"21.52","IsMasterLocation":false,"IsIncludedLocation":false}]}
